phone.label: Telefon raqami
phone.searchCountry: Mamlakat, kod yoki terish prefiksini qidiring
phone.invalid: Tanlangan mamlakat uchun haqiqiy telefon raqamini kiriting.

auth.onboardingTagline: "Men yaxshiman" va "Menga yordam kerak" orasidagi lahzalar uchun shaxsiy xavfsizlik hamrohi.
auth.createSubtitle: Xavfsizlik grafikangizni himoya qilish uchun kirish usulini tanlang.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Biz ro'yxatdan o'tishni yakunlay olmadik. Ulanishingizni tekshiring va yana urinib ko'ring.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Mahalliy rivojlanish sessiyasidan foydalanish. Native Google Sign-In rivojlanish qurilmasida ishlaydi.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Hozir juftlang yoki davom ettiring va keyinroq qo'shing.
auth.northStarBody: VL01 kiyiladigan apparat xavfsizlik harakatlarini bosish va uzoq bosish harakatlari orqali ishga tushira oladi.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Xaritada va qo'ng'iroqlarda sizning muloyim xavfsizlik hamrohingiz.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear uy rejimi, qo'riqchi rejimi, favqulodda holat, bahona qo'ng'iroqlari va ovozli qo'llab-quvvatlash bo'yicha yordam bera oladi.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Xarita, xavfli zonalar, xavfsiz yetib kelish va SOS kontekst uchun ishlatiladi.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving joylashuvni so'raydi, shunda qo'riqchilar qayerda yordam kerakligini tushunishadi. Buni keyinroq Settings bo'limida o'zgartirishingiz mumkin.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Bildirishnomalar ro'yxatdan o'tish va favqulodda holatlarni qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
permissions.notificationsBody: Biz bildirishnomalarni faqat xavfsizlik so'rovlari, favqulodda yangilanishlar va siz yoqadigan eslatmalar uchun ishlatamiz.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving sizning joylashuvingizni xavfsizlik xaritasi, xavf zonalari, tez ulashish va kontekst SOS uchun ishlatadi. Buni keyinroq Settings bo'limida o'zgartirishingiz mumkin.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving sizga ro'yxatdan o'tish eslatmalari, favqulodda yangilanishlar va xavfsizlik ko'rsatmalarini yuboradi. Biz reklama uchun bildirishnomalardan foydalanmaymiz.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving mikrofoningizni faqat AI hamroh yoki xavfsizlik chaqirig'ini boshlaganingizda ishlatadi.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving Bluetooth yordamida zargarlik buyumlari bilan NorthStar, ulanish holatini o'qish va kiyiladigan qurilmadan xavfsizlik oqimlarini ishga tushiradi.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving bu oqimni Sozlamalar va paneldan ochiq saqlaydi.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Eng xavfsiz eshitiladigan hamroh ovozni tanlang.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Besh marta bosish SOS va guardian ogohlantirishlariga o'tishi mumkin.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Noqulay vaziyatni tark etish uchun yaxshi sabab yarating.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Yordam kerak bo'lganda real vaqtda hamroh qo'ng'irog'ini boshlang.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Xavfsizlik oqimlarini past bosimli demoda sinab ko'ring.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Zargarlik buyumlarini yaqin atrofda saqlab, skanerlash.
jewelry.noDevices: Yaqin atrofda NorthStar qurilmalar hali topilmadi.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth skanerlash boshlana olmadi. Iltimos, yana urinib ko'ring.
jewelry.scanFailed: Yaqin atrofda zargarlik topa olmadik. Bluetooth tekshir, NorthStar yaqin tut va yana urinib ko'r.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth skanerlash boshlana olmadi. Bluetooth kirishni tekshiring va yana urinib ko'ring.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Yaqin atrofdagi qurilmalarga kirish o'chirilgan. Sozlamalarda Bluetooth kirishga ruxsat bering, keyin yana urinib ko'ring.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar ulanish uchun juda ko'p vaqt ketdi. Yaqinroq suring va yana urinib ko'ring.
jewelry.connectFailed: Biz NorthStar ulana olmadik. Zaryadlangan va yaqin atrofda ekanligini tekshiring, keyin yana urinib ko'ring.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Yaqin atrofda hali hech qanday qurilma yo'q
jewelry.emptyMessage: NorthStar zaryadlangan va telefonni yaqin tuting, keyin yana skanerlash.

home.subtitle: Xavfsizlik hamroh paneli
home.readyBody: Ovoz, xarita, zargarlik buyumlari va qo'riqchilar bir bosish masofasida.

map.title: Xavfsizlik xaritasi
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go oldindan ko'rish; Mapbox rivojlanish qurilmasida render qilinadi.
map.updateFailed: Joylashuvingizni yangilay olmadik. Iltimos, yana urinib ko'ring.
map.notRequested: Joylashuvga kirish so'ralmadi. Keyinroq Sozlamalardan yoqishingiz mumkin.
map.permissionOff: Joylashuvga kirish o'chirilgan. Sozlamalarda xavfsizlik xaritasini o'zingizga markazlash uchun yoqing.
map.timeout: Joylashuvingiz kutilganidan ko'proq vaqt olmoqda. Aniqroq signal beradigan joyga ko'chib o'ting va yana urinib ko'ring.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Ishonchli joylarni saqlash uchun tez kirish uchun shu yerda ko'rsatiladi.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Qo'ng'iroqni boshlang yoki tayyor bo'lganingizda xabar yozing.

history.clearMessage: Bu qurilmadan saqlangan AI hamroh xabarlarni olib tashlaydi.
history.title: Suhbat tarixi
history.subtitle: AI ushbu qurilmada saqlangan hamroh xabarlar.
history.emptyMessage: Sizning AI hamroh suhbatlaringiz birinchi qo'ng'iroqingizdan keyin shu yerda paydo bo'ladi.
history.loadFailed: Suhbat tarixini yuklay olmadik. Iltimos, yana urinib ko'ring.
history.clearFailed: Suhbat tarixini tozalay olmadik. Iltimos, yana urinib ko'ring.
history.deleteFailed: Biz o'sha suhbatni o'chirib tashlay olmadik. Iltimos, yana urinib ko'ring.

voices.title: Mening xavfsizlik qo'ng'irog'im ovozlari
voices.subtitle: To'g'ri eshitiladigan hamroh ovozni tanlang.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Bu ovoz namunasi ijro etilmadi. Iltimos, yana urinib ko'ring.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Tarmoq yoki Hume ma'lumotlari mavjud bo'lmaganda birga kelgan hamroh javoblardan foydalaning.
settings.privacyBody: Ushbu qurilmada saqlangan mahalliy ma'lumotlarni eksport qilish yoki o'chirish.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Bu sizning profilingiz, sozlamalaringiz, favqulodda kontaktlaringiz, suhbat tarixi, ruxsatnoma eslatmalari va mahalliy autentifikatsiya sessiyangizni ushbu qurilmadan olib tashlaydi.
settings.updateFailedMessage: Biz bu afzallikni saqlab qololmadik. Iltimos, yana urinib ko'ring.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Sizning sessiyangiz hali faol. Iltimos, yana urinib ko'ring.

contacts.title: Favqulodda aloqalar
contacts.subtitle: Xavfsizlik jarayonlarida ishonchli odamlar mavjud.
contacts.name: Nomi
contacts.emptyMessage: Ishonchli odamni qo'shing, shunda u xavfsizlik oqimi kerak bo'lganda tayyor bo'ladi.
contacts.removeMessage: Bu odam endi sizning favqulodda jarayoningizda ko'rinmaydi.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Bu aloqani saqlab qololmadik. Tafsilotlarni tekshiring va yana urinib ko'ring.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Biz bu aloqani olib tashlay olmadik. Iltimos, yana urinib ko'ring.

friends.title: Do'stlar
friends.subtitle: Qo'riqchilar, so'rovlar va favqulodda holatlar grafikasi.
friends.emptyMessage: Ishonchli do'stlar va qo'riqchilar qo'shilgach, bu yerda paydo bo'ladi.

emergency.title: Favqulodda SOS
emergency.subtitle: Faqat zudlik bilan yordam kerak bo'lganda kuchaytiring.
emergency.body: Bu sizning xavfsizlik oqimingizni xabardor qiladi va favqulodda aloqalarni tayyorlaydi.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Joylashuvni bo'lishish stubi tayyor. Jonli havolalarni yuborish uchun backend share endpointni ulaning.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: Xavfsiz apelsin tushirish uchun NorthStar ikki marta uring.
capybearTap.body: Gesture yo'nalishi BLE tadbir simlari uchun tayyor.

errors.voiceOffline: Siz offline ko'rinasiz. Xabaringiz qayta ulanganingizda yuboriladi.
errors.voiceQueued: Xabar saqlandi. Ovozli hamroh qayta ulanganda yuboriladi.
errors.microphone: Ovozli qo'ng'iroqlar uchun mikrofon orqali kirish talab qilinadi. Siz uni Sozlamalardan yoqishingiz yoki xabar yozishingiz mumkin.
errors.billing: Onlayn ovozli hamroh vaqtincha mavjud emas. Siz offline hamroh bilan davom etishingiz mumkin.
errors.authentication: Ovoz hamrohi ushbu sessiyani tasdiqlay olmadi. Hozircha yana tizimga kiring yoki oflayn hamrohlikdan foydalaning.
errors.timeout: Ovoz hamrohi javob berishda juda ko'p vaqt oldi. Ulanishingizni tekshiring va yana urinib ko'ring.
errors.network: Ovozli hamrohga yetib bora olmadik. Ulanishingizni tekshiring, keyin yana urinib ko'ring yoki oflayn davom eting.
errors.genericVoice: Nimadir ovozli qo'ng'iroqni to'xtatdi. Yana urinib ko'ring yoki offline hamroh bilan davom eting.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving xavfsizlik va hamroh qo'ng'iroqlari uchun mikrofon AI kerak.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving sizning joylashuvingizni xavfsizlik xaritasi va yaqin atrofdagi xavfsizlik xususiyatlari uchun ishlatadi.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving Bluetooth yordamida sizning NorthStar xavfsizlik zargarlik buyumlaringizga ulanadi.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Bu versiyada ushbu kirish usuli mavjud emas.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Demo sifatida davom etish (faqat ishlab chiqish uchun)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Demo rejimi faqat mahalliy soxta maʼlumotlardan foydalanadi. Ulangan xizmatlarda autentifikatsiya qilinmaydi va ilova qayta yuklanganda bu seans asliga qaytadi.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Tasdiqlash kodi notoʻgʻri yoki eskirgan. Yangi kod soʻrang va qayta urinib koʻring.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Kirishga urinishlar juda koʻp. Biroz kutib, qayta urinib koʻring.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Kirishni tasdiqlash juda uzoq davom etdi. Ulanishni tekshirib, qayta urinib koʻring.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Kirish xizmatiga ulanib boʻlmadi. Ulanishni tekshirib, qayta urinib koʻring.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Xavfsizlik xaritasini yuklab boʻlmadi. Ulanishni tekshirib, qayta urinib koʻring.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Jonli joylashuv mavjud emas. %{capturedAt} da saqlangan oxirgi joylashuvingiz koʻrsatilmoqda.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Joylashuvingizni ulashib boʻlmadi. Joylashuvga kirish ruxsatini tekshirib, qayta urinib koʻring.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Bu mening %{capturedAt} da qayd etilgan joylashuvim:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Bu mening %{capturedAt} da qayd etilgan oxirgi saqlangan joylashuvim:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Bluetooth ruxsati oʻchirilgan. Uni Sozlamalarda yoqing va qayta urinib koʻring.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth oʻchirilgan. Uni yoqing va qayta urinib koʻring.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Bu qurilma yoki versiyada Bluetooth orqali juftlash mavjud emas.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: NorthStar topilmadi. Uni yaqin tuting, Bluetoothni tekshiring va qayta urinib koʻring.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Yaqin atrofda NorthStar qurilmalari topilmadi. Uni yaqin tuting va qayta qidiring.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: NorthStarga ulanib boʻlmadi. Uni quvvatlangan holda yaqin tuting va qayta urinib koʻring.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Bu joyni saqlab boʻlmadi. Qayta urinib koʻring.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Telefon raqam tergichi ochildi; qoʻngʻiroq tasdiqlanmadi.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Favqulodda aloqa kontakti mavjud emas edi; qoʻngʻiroq qilinmadi.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Telefon raqam tergichini ochib boʻlmadi; qoʻngʻiroq qilinmadi.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Ovozli hamroh hozir mavjud emas. Keyinroq qayta urinib koʻring yoki oflayn hamroh bilan davom eting.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
